hero.title: Privacy, elegance and tranquility in every detail.
hero.description: A private residential community with modern apartments and exclusive villas, designed for peace, privacy and a premium lifestyle.

features.label: Why this residence?
features.title: Built for people who want more than just a home.
features.description: A residence designed for long-term comfort, privacy and timeless aesthetics that preserve value over time.
features.cardText1: A peaceful and private environment designed for families.
features.cardText2: Controlled access and a thoughtfully planned residential layout.
features.cardText3: Courtyards, pathways and open spaces for a calmer lifestyle.
features.cardText4: Elegant facades, quality materials and refined luxury details.

propertyCateg.label: Property categories
propertyCateg.title: Apartments and villas for sale
propertyCateg.description: Apartments and villas designed for different lifestyles, featuring functional layouts and modern construction standards.
propertyCateg.cardDescription1: Functional floor plans, natural light and thoughtfully designed spaces for everyday comfort.
propertyCateg.cardDescription2: Spacious living areas, maximum privacy and selected villas with private pools for a higher standard of living.

parking.label: Optional parking
parking.title: Organized parking spaces for every resident.
parking.description: Well-organized and easily accessible parking spaces available as an additional option for residents.

investment.label: A long-term investment
investment.title: A private community built for long-term living.
investment.description: The residence combines modern architecture, privacy and green surroundings for a quieter and safer lifestyle.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Book a private presentation of the residence.
contact.description: Our sales team will introduce you to the residence, property types and reservation opportunities.
